description: Use this API to change the voltage droop control name of the specified voltage droop control in the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.3.0. ierr = mbidvd(name, namnew)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the voltage droop control for which the voltage droop control name is to be changed. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: namnew
parameters.description: New name to be assigned to the voltage droop control. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: voltage droop control NAME not found.
voltage droop control NEWNAM already exists.
a non-blank new identifier must be specified.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
